title: Jira Dashboard Config
description: Structural settings for the dashboard. Machine-specific overrides go in .env instead.

port.description: HTTP port the dashboard listens on. Prefer PORT in .env.

name.description: Display name shown in the dashboard header. Override with JIRA_PROJECT_NAME in .env.

path.description: Absolute path to the git repo this dashboard manages. Override with JIRA_PROJECT_DIR in .env.

dir.description: Where to create git worktrees. Defaults to <projectDir>/.worktrees. Override with JIRA_WORKTREES_DIR in .env.

type.description: Coder backend to use (e.g. opencode, codex, dummy). Override with JIRA_CODER_TYPE in .env.

bin.description: Path to the coder CLI binary (e.g. opencode, codex, claude). Override with JIRA_CODER_BIN in .env.

timeouts.description: Max runtime (ms) for each coder stage.

venv.description: Python virtualenv config (only relevant for Python projects).

path.description: Venv directory relative to projectDir. Override with JIRA_VENV_DIR in .env.

pythonpath.description: PYTHONPATH subdirectory relative to projectDir. Override with JIRA_PYTHONPATH in .env.

command_override.description: Explicit test command instead of auto-detection. Override with JIRA_TEST_CMD in .env.

timeout.description: Max runtime (ms) for test runner and pre-push hook. Override with JIRA_TEST_TIMEOUT in .env.

mergeStrategy.description: How to close tickets: cherry-pick (merge into default branch) or pr (push + GitHub PR). Override with MERGE_STRATEGY in .env.

remoteHost.description: SSH hostname for VSCode/Cursor remote URIs. Override with REMOTE_HOST in .env.

explorer.description: File explorer URL template for diff file links.

url.description: URL template with {protocol} {host} {sha} {path} {prefix} {owner} {repo} placeholders. Override with EXPLORER_URL in .env.

owner.description: GitHub owner/org for default explorer URLs. Override with GITHUB_OWNER in .env.

repo.description: GitHub repo name for default explorer URLs. Override with GITHUB_REPO in .env.

branchDefault.description: Default git branch for checkout/rebase operations. Override with GIT_DEFAULT_BRANCH in .env.

dbBusyTimeout.description: SQLite busy timeout in milliseconds. Override with DB_BUSY_TIMEOUT in .env.
